nodes.name: Rhabdotorrhinus
nodes.summary: Rhabdotorrhinus（Rhabdotorrhinus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如白颊犀鸟、皺盔犀鳥、红头犀鸟等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 班乃岛
nodes.summary: 班乃岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括Amethyst brown dove、红头犀鸟、棕尾斑嘴犀鳥等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 红头犀鸟
nodes.summary: 红头犀鸟（Walden's hornbill，学名 Rhabdotorrhinus waldeni），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要分布于班乃岛、内格罗斯岛，主要威胁包括非法猎捕、猎捕压力、森林砍伐。
nodes.shortSummary: 红头犀鸟（學名：Rhabdotorrhinus waldeni，台湾作皺嘴皺盔犀鳥）是犀鳥目犀鳥科斑盔犀鳥屬下的一種鳥類。該物種僅分布於菲律賓的班乃岛及内格罗斯岛中的常綠低地森林及山地森林內，是中等大小的森林型犀鳥。但因族群稀少及居住環境被破壞的問題，目前被列為極危物種。 本物…

nodes.name: 非法猎捕
nodes.summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。

nodes.name: 红头犀鸟
nodes.summary: 红头犀鸟（Rhabdotorrhinus waldeni）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如红头犀鸟。

nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 内格罗斯岛
nodes.summary: 内格罗斯岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括Amethyst brown dove、Pinsker's hawk-eagle、红头犀鸟等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: As most other hornbills, this species is primarily a frugivore.]] It inhabits closed-canopy forests, also frequenting logged areas and occasionally isolated trees in clearings at an altitudinal range of 400 to 1,200 m Panay and 350 to 950 m in Negros

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: As most other hornbills, this species is primarily a frugivore.]] It inhabits closed-canopy forests, also frequenting logged areas and occasionally isolated trees in clearings at an altitudinal range of 400 to 1,200 m Panay and 350 to 950 m in Negros

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Due to this high poaching rate, Philincon has devised a nest guarding program where they pay locals US$20 a month to guard hornbill nests and offer an incentive of US$11 for each successful fledge

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is unknown if these numbers remain the same as poaching appears to have increased considerably and poached birds have been detected outside the Philippines in Indonesia and the Hungary indicating that this species is now traded internationally Local organizations such as Haribon Foundation and Philippines Biodiversity Conservation Foundation were opposed to the downlisting due to increased poaching, not being in a protected area and if original estimates from 2007 were correct and not double counted. Walden's hornbill reproduce very slowly and thus are unable to survive high hunting pressures coupled with heavy logging of the rainforests
